meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve can't debug code (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't debug code. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code Skills for Debugging Success
content.seo_description: Master Claude Code skills to crush debugging bottlenecks. A high-impact case study for freelancers using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship faster.
content.answer_block: Stop fighting cryptic stack traces. By integrating Claude Code with your IDE and leveraging Antigravity for architectural context, you offload the cognitive burden of debugging. This workflow turns hours of manual troubleshooting into automated root-cause analysis, allowing you to ship production-ready code with absolute confidence and speed.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking on a client deadline, the staging environment is throwing a cryptic 500 error, and the codebase feels like a labyrinth you built months ago. We have all been there—staring at a terminal until the text blurs, feeling the crushing weight of a bug that refuses to die. Debugging shouldn't be a test of your endurance; it should be a surgical operation.

Modern engineering isn't about knowing every syntax quirk; it's about orchestration. By deploying Claude Code as your persistent pair programmer, you transform the debugging process from a solitary struggle into a high-velocity sprint. This guide bridges the gap between frustration and flow, showing you how to leverage AI-native tools to dominate your backlog.

steps.title: Contextualize the Environment
steps.description: Before debugging, Claude needs a map. Use Antigravity to generate a concise architectural summary of your current project state to avoid hallucination.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project structure and generate a high-level dependency map focusing on the recent module changes in /src/controllers.

steps.title: Initialize the Claude CLI
steps.description: Ensure Claude Code has read access to your environment variables and logs without exposing sensitive credentials.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a .claudeignore file that excludes logs, .env files, and build artifacts to keep the context window efficient.

steps.title: Automate Root Cause Analysis
steps.description: Feed the specific error trace into Claude Code to get a prioritized list of potential failure points.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the following stack trace and map it to the function calls in the primary service layer: [PASTE TRACE]
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Analyze the provided stack trace and identify the exact line of code causing the memory leak.'

steps.title: Iterative Patching and Validation
steps.description: Apply fixes incrementally and run automated tests to ensure no regression occurs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a unit test that recreates this bug so we can verify the fix is permanent and robust.

steps.title: Final Code Review and Refinement
steps.description: Use Claude to perform a peer-review of the changes to ensure they adhere to best practices.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Conduct a security and performance audit on the recently modified code block to ensure no new vulnerabilities were introduced.

pro_tips: Use custom 'Claude instructions' to enforce your specific coding style across all projects automatically.
Always pipe error logs directly into the Claude CLI rather than copy-pasting to avoid losing metadata.
Leverage the 'checkpoint' feature in Claude Code to revert changes instantly if a fix causes unintended side effects.
Treat Claude Code as a junior developer; always ask it to explain its reasoning before applying a patch to learn faster.
Combine Antigravity's dependency mapping with Claude's refactoring tools to proactively prevent bugs before they occur.
content.next_steps: Once you have successfully debugged your current project, integrate Claude Code into your CI/CD pipeline to automate initial code reviews for every pull request.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting bugs dictate your development pace. By mastering these tools, you reclaim your time and elevate your craft to a professional, scalable standard. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
